ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the event type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sources" (
  "event_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event source */,
  "event_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the event source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the event source is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sources_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_messages" (
  "event_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event message */,
  "event_message_string" TEXT /* String of the event message */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event message */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the event message is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event message */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_messages_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_messages_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_level" (
  "event_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event level */,
  "event_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the event level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the event level is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_level_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_level_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, security analyst, auditor) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event log being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the access log is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parsers" (
  "parser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parser */,
  "parser_name" TEXT /* Name of the parser */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parser */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the parser is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parser */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parser was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parser was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parsers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parsers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
